title: Promega GoTaq G2 Flexi PCR
description: Promega GoTaq G2 Flexi DNA Polymerase: 50 uL standard reaction with a separately added, tunable MgCl2.

payload.notes: Vendor: Promega, GoTaq G2 Flexi DNA Polymerase (Cat. M7801). The Flexi (Green or Colorless) buffer contains NO magnesium, so MgCl2 is added separately and is tunable: optimize 1.0-4.0 mM in 0.5 mM steps (3 uL of 25 mM = 1.5 mM in 50 uL). Annealing: start ~5 C below the lower-Tm primer and raise in 1 C steps (Promega BioMath calculator). The 55 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Primers 0.1-1.0 uM. Cycles 25-30 (up to 40 for low-copy targets). Extension ~1 min/kb at 72-74 C. Preheat the cycler to 95 C before loading. Source: https://www.promega.com/-/media/files/resources/protocols/product-information-sheets/g/gotaq-g2-flexi-dna-polymerase-protocol.pdf
